tagline: Top Rated Pool Service Company in Brevard County!

hero.headline: Your Space Coast Pool, Always Sparkling
hero.subheadline: You deserve a pool that is ready whenever you are. Happy Pool & Spa handles all the cleaning, chemicals, and care so you never have to lift a finger — just dive in.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Complete Pool & Spa Care<br class="hidden md:block"> for Every Need
services.subtitle: From weekly maintenance to emergency rescues, Happy Pool & Spa keeps your water crystal clear and swim-ready year-round across Brevard County.

cards.title: Weekly Pool Cleaning
cards.description: Skimming, vacuuming, brushing, chemical balancing, and equipment checks — every week like clockwork. Your pool stays swim-ready without you lifting a finger.

cards.title: Weekly Spa Maintenance
cards.description: Expert hot tub and spa care including water testing, chemical balancing, filter cleaning, and surface scrubbing to keep your spa relaxing and safe.

cards.title: Green-to-Clean Rescue
cards.description: Pool turned green or cloudy? We restore neglected pools to sparkling condition fast. One-time deep clean service with same-week availability.

cards.title: Chlorine Delivery Service
cards.description: Convenient chlorine and chemical delivery for DIY pool owners. Professional-grade products dropped off on your schedule — no store runs needed.

cards.title: Chemical-Only Service
cards.description: Prefer to handle your own cleaning? We take care of the tricky part — precise water chemistry balancing to keep water safe, clear, and gentle on skin.

cards.title: Commercial Pool Care
cards.description: Reliable pool and spa service for hotels, HOAs, fitness centers, and apartment communities across Brevard County. Consistent quality your tenants notice.

steps.title: Request Your Free Quote
steps.description: Tell us about your pool or spa. We will provide an honest, no-pressure quote quickly. No contracts, no commitments — just straightforward pricing.

steps.title: We Take It From Here
steps.description: Our background-checked, certified technicians arrive on schedule. Cleaning, chemicals, equipment checks — everything handled with care and attention to detail.

steps.title: Enjoy Your Pool & Spa
steps.description: Your pool stays crystal clear and swim-ready all year. If you are ever not satisfied, we come back and make it right — that is the Happy Pool promise.

about.label: Why Brevard County Trusts Us
about.headline: Founded by a Local, Built on Doing It Right
about.description: Happy Pool & Spa was founded by Ryan Marcinik, a Brevard County native who grew up on the Space Coast. What started as a passion for helping neighbors keep their pools pristine has grown into one of the highest-rated pool services in the area — with 319 five-star reviews and counting. Every technician is background-checked and certified, because your family's safety matters as much as your water clarity.

features.title: Background-Checked & Certified
features.description: Every technician passes a thorough background check and holds pool care certifications before entering your backyard.

features.title: No Contracts. Ever.
features.description: We earn your business every single visit. No long-term lock-ins, no cancellation fees, no surprises on your bill.

features.title: 100% Satisfaction Guaranteed
features.description: Not happy with a visit? We come back and redo it at no charge. Your satisfaction is our reputation — and we protect it.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. Zero Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Choose the service that fits your needs. No contracts, no hidden fees — upgrade, downgrade, or cancel anytime.

guarantee.headline: Our "Always Happy" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you are not 100% satisfied with any service visit, call us and we will come back and make it right at no extra cost. No questions asked, no fine print. We built our 4.9-star reputation one happy pool owner at a time — and we plan to keep it that way.

faqs.question: How quickly can you start service?
faqs.answer: Most new clients are scheduled within the same week. For green pool emergencies, we offer rapid response. Just call us at 321-341-2566 and we will work with your schedule.

faqs.question: Do I need to be home during service?
faqs.answer: Not at all. Most clients provide gate access and we handle everything while you are out. You will know exactly what was done after each visit so you are always in the loop.

faqs.question: Are your technicians background-checked?
faqs.answer: Yes, every single one. All Happy Pool & Spa technicians pass a comprehensive background check and hold pool care certifications. Your family's safety comes first.

faqs.question: Do you require a contract?
faqs.answer: Never. No contracts, no cancellation penalties, no strings attached. We believe in earning your trust every visit. If we are not the right fit, you can cancel anytime.

faqs.question: What areas do you service?
faqs.answer: We serve all of Brevard County including Melbourne, Palm Bay, Viera, Cocoa Beach, Satellite Beach, Merritt Island, Titusville, Rockledge, Indialantic, and more. Call us to confirm your area.

testimonials.name: Suzanne W.
testimonials.text: It has been a tortuous journey finding an excellent pool cleaning service — but we finally found Happy Pool! Ryan and technician Akai are professional and deliver consistent weekly service. Could not be happier.

testimonials.name: James T.
testimonials.text: Ryan provided outstanding service — punctual, courteous, incredibly thorough. Our pool has never looked better. Highly recommend Happy Pool & Spa for anyone wanting great quality service.

testimonials.name: Linda M.
testimonials.text: Professional, punctual, and always going the extra mile. The technicians are friendly, respectful, and take the time to explain maintenance processes. Best pool service in Brevard County.
